name: StickMan Parkour 2
description: Here is another Version of Stickman Parkour Games. Your mission is to run and jump to reach the the door to unlock the next level. Be careful to not fall from edges and try to avoid obstacles. Let the adventure begins!
instructions: A and D to move left and right use W to jump and climb use S and D or A to scroll you can also use arrows
tags: Batman, Best, Hot, Hypercasual, jump, Jumping, run, running, Stickman
